series_metadata.series_description: Payment requests, applications and correspondence from students and college/university personnel related to this program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain applications and correspondence from awardees and institutions in office 2 years. After audit by Auditor of State is completed and released, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain data entry of payment history and refunds for awardees to their graduate institution for 2 years. After audit by Auditor of State is completed and released, destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
